basics.name: Dr. Sagar H P
basics.label: Data Scientist | Research Engineer
basics.summary:
Hey There!, Welcome to my online portfolio! I'm a Data Scientist by profession and a Researcher at heart (with a Ph.D. in triboelectric sensors design and development from Indian Institute of Technology Bombay).
I specialize in data analysis, machine learning, statistical modeling, and artificial neural networks. Proficient in Python, MATLAB, and visualization tools like PowerBI, I excel at solving complex real-world problems and extracting valuable insights from diverse datasets. My expertise includes developing predictive models, regression models, classification algorithms, and anomaly detection techniques. I am known for creating impactful data visualizations and conducting thorough, data-driven research. Through effective collaboration and communication, I deliver innovative, data-driven solutions by partnering with cross-functional teams. I thrive on tackling real-world multiphysics problems and leveraging my diverse skill set to create tangible success stories
